title: Yacht Charter in Barcelona: A 2026 Guide to Prices, Boats & More
html:
Barcelona offers a spectacular coastline for yacht charter, with departures from Port Olímpic and prices from €350 for a half-day motorboat. To get started, compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Barcelona or list your own.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Barcelona?

Boat rental prices in Barcelona range from €60 per person for a shared tour to €2,500 for a full-day crewed yacht. The cost depends on the boat type, duration and season. For a small motorboat (half-day), expect €350, €600; a catamaran full-day sits around €1,200, €2,000. For the latest options, check the boat hire Barcelona listings on BoatHire24.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Barcelona?

You do not need a licence for most small motorboats up to 15 HP, but larger boats require a valid licence. The Spanish system requires the PER (Patrón de Embarcaciones de Recreo) for boats up to 12 metres, or a PNB for smaller vessels. The operator confirms exact requirements, and many operators offer skippered charters so you can enjoy the trip without a licence.

Where to set off in Barcelona

Port Olímpic is the main hub for leisure boating, just east of Barceloneta beach. Other departure points include Port Ginesta, the largest marina on the Catalan coast (35 minutes south), and Port de Mataró (20 minutes north). Popular destinations are the beaches of Sitges, the Maresme towns such as Premià de Mar, and the nearby natural park of Garraf for its secluded coves. For a longer trip, head to Illes Medes: a protected marine reserve around 35 nautical miles north-east of Barcelona.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat, ideal for small groups up to 6 guests; from €550 for a full day. A good example is the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open - 150 HP listing, perfect for zipping along the coast.
  2. Sailing yacht, best for a relaxed day on the water with up to 8 guests; from €900 full-day.
  3. Catamaran, spacious and stable, great for families and parties up to 12 guests; from €1,200 full-day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht, for premium experiences with crew, up to 10 guests; from €2,500 full-day. Brands like Azimut and Sunseeker are commonly available.
  5. RIB or tender, fast and agile for watersports enthusiasts, 4, 6 guests; from €300 half-day.

Costs and seasons

  • Shared tour (3, 4 hours): €60, €100 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €350, €600 for up to 6 guests
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): €1,200, €2,000 for up to 12 guests
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: €2,000, €3,500 for up to 10 guests, including skipper and fuel
High season in Barcelona runs from June to September, with August the busiest. The local wind known as the Garbí can pick up in the afternoons, so morning departures are often calmer.

At a glance

  • Price band: €60, €3,500 (shared tour to crewed yacht)
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 3 hours to full day
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR (euros)

Questions about boat rental in Barcelona

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Barcelona?

Yes, you can rent boats up to 15 HP without a licence, but for larger vessels you must have a valid Spanish or equivalent licence, or charter a boat with a skipper.

What is the best time of day for a boat trip?

Morning trips (9am, 1pm) typically offer calmer seas and less wind, with clear views of the Barcelona skyline.

Are there options for large groups?

Yes, catamarans and large motor yachts can accommodate up to 12 guests; some operators allow up to 14 by special request.

Do I need to book in advance for August?

Absolutely: August is the busiest month, so booking at least two weeks ahead is strongly recommended to secure availability.

Whether you are a seasoned sailor or a first-timer, Barcelona offers a yacht charter experience for every taste. BoatHire24 connects you with local boat owners and professional charter companies across the city. For a hassle-free trip, start comparing your options today and if you own a boat, consider listing your boat on BoatHire24 to reach thousands of travellers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Barcelona and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
